name: Safe Pro Group Inc.
summary: PART I Overview Safe Pro Group Inc. was incorporated as a Delaware corporation in December 2021. Safe Pro Group was created to provide innovative security and protection products and has strategically acquired and assembled three active business units focused on protecting those who protect us all. Our strategic emphasis is on the development of a software-based ecosystem for analyzing drone imagery and data utilizing proprietary artificial intelligence (AI), machine learning, deep learning, and...
